description: INPI Indicadores de PI — PRG — sheet 'Deposito_PRG_Município'. Annual series 2000-2024, anuário edition. Faithful wide image of the source sheet (cells kept as c01…); see docs/methodology/inpi_indicadores.md.
source: INPI — Instituto Nacional da Propriedade Industrial, Tabelas Completas dos Indicadores de Propriedade Industrial (Anuário Estatístico), 2024 edition
grain: faithful wide image — one row per source spreadsheet row
notes: Cultural IP cut at the file level (prg/di/ig/mrc only). Trademark cultural slice = Nice classes 41+16 (tight) or +9+28 (wide), applied downstream on the mrc class tables — the class dimension is preserved here, not pre-filtered.
